jobs.title: Java Developer @ Audi Business Innovation GmbH
jobs.description: Developed a web UI for CloudFoundry. Developed a microservices backend for an e-commerce system. Applied principles of resilient software design in the integration of services. Designed and implemented self-contained systems in the further scaling of the project. Carried out technical interviews with external developers and product owners for selection.

jobs.title: Master's Thesis @ fortiss GmbH

jobs.title: Research Assistant @ Technical University of Munich
jobs.description: Enabled Big Data processing of DNA sequences on the LRZ compute cloud by setting up the infrastructure. Published first scientific paper: Lagkouvardos, Ilias, et al. "IMNGS: A comprehensive open resource of processed 16S rRNA microbial profiles for ecology and diversity studies."

jobs.title: Software Engineering Intern @ Flughafen München GmbH
jobs.description: Applied agile management methods in a big software project. Experienced a full software development life cycle starting from requirements engineering to implementation and customer acceptance.
